description_long: This airplane features a sleek, manta ray-inspired design with a broad, gently curved wing structure that seamlessly integrates into the fuselage. The front showcases a prominent, vertically slatted intake or grille, flanked by two slender, downward-curving landing skids. The wings are highly swept and smoothly contoured, giving the aircraft a futuristic and aerodynamic appearance. The cockpit is positioned centrally atop the fuselage, with a small, slightly raised canopy that appears to be enclosed and streamlined. The surface is predominantly a light metallic gray, with subtle panel lines and minimal visible rivets, suggesting advanced construction techniques. The overall form is compact and elegant, with no visible external engines or traditional tail surfaces, emphasizing a unique and modern aesthetic.
description: A sleek, manta ray-shaped airplane with broad swept wings, a central raised cockpit, and a prominent front grille, finished in metallic gray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, curved wings, central intake grille, and two slender landing skids.
description_view_1: Left rear oblique view highlighting the smooth wing sweep, raised cockpit canopy, and the absence of a traditional tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tapering fuselage, symmetrical wing sweep, and the minimalistic, tailless design.
description_view_3: Right rear oblique view emphasizing the wing curvature, cockpit placement, and the streamlined body.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, highly swept, blended wing-body with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No visible external engines; possible internal jet or electric configuration.
attribute_tail_design: Tailless configuration with no conventional, T-tail, V-tail, or H-tail surfaces.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed twin skid landing gear, no visible wheels.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Central, mid-fuselage, single enclosed canopy with forward visibility.
